datasheet.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, if this unit made a Charge move or was charged this turn, add 1 to the Wound roll .
datasheet.name: Jungle Fighters

items: 1 Jungle Fighter Sergeant and 9 Jungle Fighters
2 Jungle Fighter Sergeants and 18 Jungle Fighters

unit_composition.label: Every Jungle Fighter Sergeant is equipped with

unit_composition.text: lasgun; close combat weapon. This unit can have up to two Leader units attached to it, provided no more than one of those units is a COMMAND SQUAD unit. If it does, and this Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths .
unit_composition.label: Every Jungle Fighter is equipped with

entries.label: For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Jungle Fighter’s lasgun can be replaced with 1 flamer.
For every 10 models in this unit, 1 Jungle Fighter equipped with a lasgun can be equipped with 1 vox-caster (that model’s lasgun cannot be replaced).

entries.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, if this unit made a Charge move or was charged this turn, add 1 to the Wound roll .
entries.name: Jungle Fighters

entries.text: Each time you target the bearer’s unit with a Stratagem , roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if there are one or more friendly OFFICER models within 6": on a 5+, you gain 1CP.
entries.label: Vox-caster
